name: Exchange rate
description: For foreign exchange transactions that are not options, this data element reports: (a) the exchange rate taken from the trade confirmation, or (b) if there is no such exchange rate specified in the trade confirmation, calculated by dividing Notional amount—Leg 1 by Notional amount—Leg 2 (and, if necessary, inverted to the rate as is conventionally quoted in foreign exchange markets for the currency pair—see paragraph 424).
format: up to 25 numerals, including up to 5 numerals after the decimal point
optionalityRules: Exchange rate is required to be reported if Asset class is CURR and Contract type is not OPTN
Not-reported for Action types: TERM, EROR, PRTO
valueRules: If the calculated exchange rate is not of the same magnitude as is conventionally quoted in foreign exchange markets for the currency pair, the calculated exchange rate should be inverted for reporting as Exchange rate.
Values are not reported for the not-reported Action types.
